{{Infobox concept
| name = Territories (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy)
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|None of the Territories are safe.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8">''House of Blades'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|A person's full power cannot be called up in someone else's [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16">''House of Blades'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|There are ten original Territories: nine unnamed ones and [[Elysia]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Territories are usually embodied in a single [[Incarnation]] at a time.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
